steps.title: Identify the bounds from the problem
steps.content: The train's speed varied between 45 mph and 60 mph. "Varied between" means the speed was at least 45 and at most 60, inclusive.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm
steps.content:
• Choice A — $s\le15$: This caps speed at 15 mph — below the stated range. ✗
  • Choice B — $s\le45$: Only an upper bound; allows speeds below 45 and excludes speeds up to 60. ✗
  • Choice C — $s\le60$: Only an upper bound; allows any speed below 60 but ignores the lower bound of 45. ✗
  • Choice D — $45\le s\le60$: Exactly captures both bounds — speed is between 45 and 60 inclusive. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
